title: Translate adapter DTOs at the edge
scenario: Adapter DTOs should be converted into domain commands before use-case logic runs.
instructions: Define RegisterUserRequest and implement TryFrom<RegisterUserRequest> for domain::RegisterUserCommand.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps register-adapter-dto explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
